description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ActionsCI that runs on push to master and on pull requests to master. The workflow has five jobs: build-ubuntu, build-ubuntu-sharedlink, build-ubuntu22, build-macos, and build-macos-sharedlink. Each job runs on a different environment (ubuntu-24.04, ubuntu-24.04, ubuntu-22.04, macos-latest, and macos-latest respectively), checks out the code, installs dependencies, configures, builds, and tests the project.
